tools.name: get_latest_news
tools.title: Get latest announcements
tools.description: Fetch the most recent USD.ONLINE announcements/news items published to the platform.

limit.description: Number of most recent announcements to return (1-20).

tools.name: get_featured_prices
tools.title: Get featured crypto prices
tools.description: Get current spot prices (USD) for featured cryptocurrencies from Binance. Supports BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, DOGE.

symbols.description: Optional list of ticker symbols like ['BTC','ETH']. Defaults to all featured symbols.

tools.name: get_yield_info
tools.title: Get USD.ONLINE yield strategies
tools.description: Get USD.ONLINE staking strategies with APR, daily-compounded APY, minimum deposit, and lock period.
